description.en: Programs can only mutate accounts they own. Implement a checker for writable account permissions.
description.pt: Programas so podem alterar contas que possuem. Implemente um verificador de permissao de escrita.
description.es: Los programas solo pueden modificar cuentas que poseen. Implementa un verificador de permisos de escritura.

hints.en: Writable requires account.isWritable to be true.
hints.pt: Writable exige account.isWritable igual a true.
hints.es: Writable requiere account.isWritable igual a true.

hints.pt: Owner deve ser igual ao programId.

hints.en: Return deniedReason when access is blocked.
hints.pt: Retorne deniedReason quando o acesso for bloqueado.
hints.es: Devuelve deniedReason cuando el acceso sea bloqueado.
